name: Analytics
description: The availability of data and insights on viewer behavior and stream performance.

name: Audience Reach
description: The potential number of viewers that can be reached through the platform.

name: Audience Reach
description: Estimated number of active users on the platform.
sources: Various sources based on platform analytics and reports

name: Audience Size
description: Estimated number of active users or viewers on the platform. A larger audience provides greater potential reach for live streams.
sources: Various sources reporting platform user statistics

name: Audience Size
description: Potential reach based on the platform's user base.

name: Audience Size/Reach
description: The potential number of viewers that can be reached through the platform.
sources: Various sources depending on platform. e.g., Streams Charts, YouTube Analytics, Facebook Insights

name: Audience Size/Reach
description: Potential audience size and platform reach, considering active user base.
sources: Streams Charts, YouTube Live, Facebook Live, Instagram Live, TikTok Live

name: Community Engagement
description: Strength and activity of the platform's community.

name: Community Engagement Tools
description: Features available to interact with viewers (e.g., chat, polls, reactions).

name: Content Archiving
description: The ability to save and store live streams for later viewing.

name: Content Category Suitability
description: The platform's primary focus and the types of content that perform best on it.

name: Content Focus
description: Primary content type (e.g., gaming, general entertainment, music).
sources: App Store/Play Store description, user reviews

name: Customization
description: Ability to add overlays, alerts, and other graphics.

name: DVR
description: The ability to record live streams.

name: Ease of Use
description: Subjective assessment of how simple and intuitive the app is to use for both streaming and viewing, considering interface design and available features.

name: Ease of Use
description: How user-friendly the platform is for both beginners and experienced streamers.

name: Ease of Use
description: The intuitiveness and simplicity of the platform's interface and features.

name: Ease of Use
description: User-friendliness of the app, especially for beginners.
sources: Facebook Live, Prism Live Studio, StreamYard, Go Live

name: Ease of Use
description: How simple it is to set up and start a live stream.

name: Ease of Use
description: How user-friendly the app is for beginners and experienced streamers.

name: Ease of Use
description: The simplicity and intuitiveness of the app's interface, making it easy for creators to start and manage live streams.

name: Engagement Features
description: Tools for interacting with viewers (chat, polls, reactions, gifts).
sources: Twitch, YouTube, TikTok Live, Facebook Live

name: Features
description: Variety and quality of tools and functionalities offered, such as chat, alerts, overlays, multistreaming, and analytics.

name: Features
description: The range of tools and options available for customizing and enhancing live streams (e.g., overlays, chat moderation, analytics).

name: Features
description: Additional functionalities that enhance the live streaming experience, such as chat, filters, overlays, and analytics.

name: Gaming Focus
description: Primary focus on gaming content.

name: Interactive Features
description: The types of tools available for engaging with the audience in real-time (e.g., chat, polls, Q&A).

name: Mobile Optimization
description: Optimized for mobile streaming and viewing.

name: Mobile Optimization
description: Performance and features specific to mobile devices.

name: Mobile-Friendly
description: Responsiveness and usability of the platform on mobile devices.

name: Monetization Options
description: Methods available for creators to earn revenue, including ads, subscriptions, donations, virtual gifts, and pay-per-view.
sources: Various sources discussing monetization strategies for live streaming apps

name: Monetization Options
description: The availability and variety of methods for creators to earn revenue from their live streams (e.g., ads, subscriptions, donations).

name: Monetization Options
description: The availability of features that allow creators to earn revenue from their live streams.

name: Monetization Options
description: Availability of monetization features (ads, subscriptions, tips, gifts).
sources: YouTube Live, Twitch, TikTok Live, Bigo Live, Stream, JWP

name: Monetization Options
description: Availability of features like subscriptions, donations, ads.

name: Monetization Options
description: Availability of features like subscriptions, ads, donations, and virtual gifts.

name: Monetization Options
description: Opportunities for streamers to earn money through ads, subscriptions, donations, etc.

name: Monetization Options
description: The availability of features that allow creators to earn revenue from their live streams, such as subscriptions, donations, or ad revenue sharing.

name: Multi-Platform Streaming
description: The ability to simultaneously broadcast to multiple platforms.

name: Multi-Platform Streaming
description: Ability to stream to multiple platforms simultaneously.

name: Multi-Streaming Capabilities
description: The ability to stream to multiple platforms simultaneously.

name: Multi-Streaming Support
description: Ability to stream to multiple platforms simultaneously.

name: Platform Compatibility
description: Operating systems and devices supported by the app (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows, macOS).
sources: App store listings and developer information

name: Platform Compatibility
description: Whether the app is available on iOS, Android, and/or desktop.

name: Platform Compatibility
description: The number of platforms to which the app can stream (e.g., Twitch, YouTube, Facebook).

name: Platform Reach
description: Number of active users or potential audience on the platform.
sources: Various sources (e.g., official reports, third-party statistics)

name: Pricing
description: Pricing model, whether it is free, subscription-based, or has in-app purchases.
sources: Each App's respective app store page.

name: Professional/Business Features
description: Features tailored for professional use (analytics, security, AI).
sources: LinkedIn Live, Vimeo Livestream, Wowza, Dacast, IBM Video Streaming, JWP

name: Real-Time Interaction
description: The availability of features such as live chat, polls, and Q&A sessions.

name: Security
description: The measures taken to protect content and viewers, such as encryption and moderation tools.

name: Simultaneous Streams
description: Number of streams that can be watched at the same time.

name: Streaming Quality
description: The maximum resolution and frame rate supported by the platform.

name: User Base
description: The number of active users on the platform. A larger user base provides a higher potential audience for live streams.
sources: Publicly available statistics, App store data

name: Video Quality
description: The maximum supported video resolution and frame rate for live streams.

name: Video Quality & Features
description: Quality of video streaming, customization options, and special effects.
sources: YouTube Live, Prism Live Studio, Camo Studio
